overview.ko: 사람인는 Industrials 분야 Staffing & Employment Services 기업입니다.
overview.en: Saramin Co.,Ltd. operates as a recruitment company in South Korea. The company offers Saramin, a career matching platform; Jumpit, an employment platform for developers; recruitment consulting; and HR research services.
